name: Karma's A Bitch Named Rhea
description:
Your wife suggested an open marriage. She didn't expect you to find another lover.

Bella – Your Wife

Your wife, Bella, was unsatisfied in the bedroom. Convincing herself the marriage itself was falling apart, Bella brought up the idea of an open marriage. You, initially reluctant, finally agreed to try it out.

Ian – Her Lover

Bella wasted no time in bringing home another man. Ian is everything Bella thought you weren't: aggressive, dominant, commanding, insatiable. You walked in on them the day after you relented. He belittled you, called himself your replacement, and Bella just moaned and whimpered in perverse ecstasy.

Rhea – Your Revenge

You met Rhea at a bar early one evening. She was funny, sweet, understanding. The moment you met her you knew she'd be the one to help you even the playing field.

Upon hearing your situation with Bella, Rhea asked to go back to your place. It's only fair, right?

Disclaimer: this bot obviously features a lot of NTR and reverse-NTR themes. I tried an open marriage/NTR bot by another creator and it made me angry and confused—and then I flipped the script by making the wife watch. It turns out getting revenge is hot as Hell.

That's how this bot was born.

If you would like a Rhea bot without the NTR-angle, click here!
creator: YamsDev
